programs.title: Wolfgang (extraordinari)
programs.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, nine-year-old Wolfgang (Jordi Catalán), an exceptionally gifted boy with features on the autism spectrum, is forced to live with his father, Carles (Miki Esparbé), whom he has never met before.An orderly nine-year-old who strives for perfection cannot stand his father's chaotic lifestyle.He wants to escape to Paris to study at the Grimald Academy and become the best pianist in the world.When Carles discovers his plan, he must make the most important decision in his life: follow his dream of an acting career or sacrifice his plans and become the father Wolfgang really needs.

programs.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programs.desc: The authorities of the Midtown School of Science and Technology are organizing a two-week expedition to the Old Continent.Tour participants visit, among others, Venice.The city is attacked by a powerful Water Elemental.Peter Parker tries to save his friends, but he is powerless against the creature.Fortunately, Mysterio comes to his aid and kills the creature.A mysterious savior once lived in an alternate reality.He convinces Parker to engage in the fight against the creatures that were supposed to destroy his civilization.The boy refuses because he wants to live the life of an ordinary teenager and find happiness with MJ.As a result of a trick involving Nick Fury, he changes his mind.He makes a disastrous decision when he gives Beck the glasses he inherited from his mentor Tony Stark, which enable him to take control of the artificial intelligence created by the millionaire.He must correct his mistake as soon as possible.

programs.title: Veep 3
programs.desc: In the third season, vice president Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) tries for a promotion.To this end, he is trying to win over voters during the premiere of his new book 'Some New Beginnings'.

programs.title: Veep 3
programs.desc: In the third season, vice president Selina Meyer (Julia Louis-Dreyfus) tries for a promotion.To this end, he is trying to win over voters during the premiere of his new book 'Some New Beginnings'.

programs.title: Drazen
programs.desc: 1970s.Teenage Dražen Petrovic (Tonko Stosic) living in Šibenik discovers, thanks to his older brother, Aleksander (Lovre Tanfara), that he has a talent for playing basketball.At first, he trained only with him or alone - in the evenings in the gym.When his abilities are noticed at school, he joins the local team, Šibenka, where he is successful.During this time, he falls in love with Renata (Romina Tonkovic).Over time, a talented young man (Domagoj Nizic) goes to a club in Zagreb and then abroad, among others.to Real Madrid, and finally received an offer to play with the New York Brooklyn Nets team, part of the NBA league.Unfortunately, Dražen's passion for basketball also becomes his curse, and success is associated with problems in his personal life, also in his relationship with Renata.A biographical story about the outstanding Croatian athlete, called the Mozart of basketball, who was the first European to play in the NBA.

programs.title: The Night Before Christmas In Wonderland
programs.desc: One day, Santa Claus receives a letter from the Queen of Hearts.Together with his faithful team of reindeer, he sets off to Karina Czarów to deliver a gift for her.However, he quickly gets into serious trouble.
